---
title: "Midsummer Day, or, The Two Churches."
---

## Midsummer Day, or, The Two Churches.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1848
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, Paternoster Row, London, and Joseph Masters, New Bond Street, London.

### Notes

This story was later reprinted in The Christmas Mummers.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
